subject: (no subject)
body:
it's been three months since your 360 degree
e-mail///Last night , instead of being appreciative
for, my wanting to help you, and after leaving me in
Paris, with little regard to what I had needed, you
suggested I had told Natalie that you sleep too much,(
instead of realizing that she probably believed that
if you thought I  had said something you would take
her ideas more seriously) you proceeded to ask in an
all too familiar  ,distastful tone,  "Why did you
"complain" to Natalie,,( I refuse to be spoken to that
way}  ,,After changing  your version of the
conversation three times.unfortunately  for the first
time since I left  Paris I found myself losing my
patience. Does this make any sense to you.. I don't
believe the issue of sleep has been around for more
than a year. As opposed to  learning to have fun
fishing, for girls,, your focus was how "disgusting"
the bait is.. (the boyfriend and shopping story), 
Instead of figuring out, how to have fun , it was
"Natalie was really too tired " , but she said you had
your sergeant voice so she felt she had to go out. If
you  are unhappy , and unfulfilled, let's decide how
to make it better,, it is unfair to lay the blame at
my doorstep. you return from Europe , where you had 
totally free time,, empty handed,, but maybe in better
physical shape.., I have yet to hear , the results of
your thinking about what you would like to do.. , I
know I feel I am struggling to get you to  understand,
with little result.. I'm sure you're as frustrated , I
love you too much to have this contention. It
shouldn't be a struggle!!.   

__________________________________________________
Do You Yahoo!?
Tired of spam?  Yahoo! Mail has the best spam protection around 
http://mail.yahoo.com
